description: Default unified pattern configuration for all IHVs

HTPPatternRules.description: GELU activation function implemented using Erf (Gaussian Error Function). This pattern consists of Div, Erf, Add, and Mul operations that together compute the GELU activation: x * 0.5 * (1 + erf(x / sqrt(2)))

SkeletonPatternRules.description: GELU activation using Erf approximation - Variant 1
SkeletonPatternRules.explanation: The current Erf-based GELU implementation consists of multiple operations (Div, Erf, Add, Mul) which results in suboptimal performance. Using the native Gelu operator will improve inference speed by approximately 30% on this hardware.

alternatives.details: The Erf-based GELU pattern is not efficiently supported on this hardware. Replace it with the native Gelu operator which provides better performance and full hardware acceleration support.

SkeletonPatternRules.explanation: The current Gemm implementation consists of multiple operations which results in suboptimal performance.

alternatives.details: Replace it with the native Gemm operator which provides better performance and full hardware acceleration support.

alternatives.reason: Use 1x1 Conv2D for Qualcomm NPU acceleration (4D NHWC inputs)
Use 1x1 Conv2D for Qualcomm NPU acceleration (3D sequence inputs)
Use 1x1 Conv2D for Qualcomm NPU acceleration (2D Gemm replacement)

SkeletonPatternRules.explanation: The current LayerNormalization implementation consists of multiple operations (ReduceMean, Sub, Pow, Add, Sqrt, Div, Mul, Add) which results in suboptimal performance. Using the native LayerNormalization operator will improve inference speed by fusing these operations into a single optimized kernel.

alternatives.details: The LayerNormalization pattern is not efficiently supported on this hardware. Replace it with the native LayerNormalization operator which provides better performance and full hardware acceleration support.

SkeletonPatternRules.explanation: The current LayerNormalization implementation consists of multiple operations (ReduceMean, Sub, Pow, Add, Sqrt, Div, Mul, Add) which results in suboptimal performance. Using the native LayerNormalization operator will improve inference speed by fusing these operations into a single optimized kernel.

alternatives.details: The LayerNormalization pattern is not efficiently supported on this hardware. Replace it with the native LayerNormalization operator which provides better performance and full hardware acceleration support.

SkeletonPatternRules.explanation: The current Reshape-Transpose-Reshape sequence can be fused into a single optimized operator. This pattern is commonly found in attention mechanisms (e.g., SAM2 encoder) and the merge reduces graph complexity, improving inference performance.

alternatives.details: The ReshapeTransposeReshapeOverlyHighDimPattern (commonly found in attention mechanisms) can be merged into a single ReshapeTransposeReshapeLowDimPattern. Use the WinML CLI rewrite flag to apply this optimization before exporting.
alternatives.reason: Merged axes reduce Transpose dimensionality for better hardware compatibility
